name: Chocolate and Sour Cream Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine semisweet chocolate, baking chocolate, and margarine. Melt gently in a microwave or over simmering water using a double boiler. Let cool to lukewarm.
2. Mix sour cream, sugar, corn syrup, egg, and vanilla extract with the melted chocolates until well blended.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt. Gradually add this mixture to the chocolate blend, stirring until thoroughly combined. Fold in the chocolate chips.
4. Divide batter evenly among 12 paper-lined or greased muffin tins. Bake in a preheated oven set to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for about 20 minutes. Remove muffins from tins and allow to cool on wire racks.
Yield: approximately 12 muffins
